understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to win each KA59 level by positioning every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked with '+' on the semantic grid, with all goals occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN, then proceed through all levels until the run reports WIN for the whole game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) attempted to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in that direction; walls/boundaries and adjacent objects could block movement, and some adjacent objects were pushable so they could be moved along if space allowed. Multiple selectable pieces could exist, and CLICK with an exact on-screen pixel coordinate (matching the positions in the state dict) switched control to that piece; the semantic_grid used P for the selected piece and S for other selectables, while the movement_blocked flags were only hints and not guaranteed outcomes.
